form_factor.comment: Terminal interface, desktop app, and IDE extension plus @opencode-ai/sdk for programmatic server/session control. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://opencode.ai/docs/; Extension: https://opencode.ai/docs/ide/; SDK: https://opencode.ai/docs/sdk/; Mac App: https://opencode.ai/download.

released_in.comment: Exact public launch month not confirmed in public docs captured for this dataset.

latest_major_update.comment: Latest release v1.17.17 (July 9, 2026) improves Meta reasoning-model handling and desktop v2 sessions with a dismissible tabs intro, refreshed help entry point, updated sub-agent task rows, clearer revert dock, a v2 free-model selector, and model-selector text rendering fixes.

rules.comment: Supports instruction/config files. Location: `AGENTS.md` and opencode config files in the repo/user config scope.

skills.comment: Supports skills. Location: opencode Agent Skills are stored as skill folders with `SKILL.md` according to the configured scope.

mcp_servers.comment: Supports MCP servers. Location: `opencode.json` / opencode config MCP server entries.

custom_commands.comment: Supports commands. Location: opencode custom commands are configured under opencode command/config files, not shell aliases.

goal_command.comment: Built-in TUI commands are `/init`, `/undo`, `/redo`, `/share`, and `/help` only; no first-party `/goal` for persistent session objectives yet.

monitor.comment: OpenCode supports custom agents and run mode; reviewed docs do not show a dedicated Monitor-equivalent for arbitrary background command output or event streams.

custom_model_provider.comment: Supports many providers and custom provider configuration.

pricing.value: Free MIT/BYOK; OpenCode Go $5 first month then $10/mo; Zen pay-as-you-go with $20 balance/top-up; Enterprise/per-seat paths
pricing.comment: OpenCode Go is the fixed subscription for open coding models; Zen is the pay-as-you-go model gateway and BYOK remains free.

some_free_usage.comment: OpenCode homepage documents free models included.

no_account_required.comment: OpenCode supports running local models, so it can be used without an OpenCode-hosted account when configured locally.

can_use_other_subscriptions.comment: OpenCode supports 75+ LLM providers and local models via provider configuration/API keys.

transcripts.comment: Location: OpenCode stores sessions/messages in SQLite `~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db`; legacy storage uses `~/.local/share/opencode/storage/session|message|part/`.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
